query: A vendor is proposing Module A integration for $14,000. Is this within the allocated budget?
The backend team wants to use MySQL 8.0 for faster prototyping. Is this allowed by the project specification?
A contractor submitted code written in Python 3.10. Is this compliant with the project requirements?
The design review is scheduled for February 20th. Is this on time according to the project spec?
The team needs written approval to change the database engine. Who must provide this approval?
A team member wants to use Docker 25.0 because it is already installed on their machine. Is this acceptable?
A pull request was approved by two senior engineers and is ready to merge. Is the review requirement satisfied?
After launch, the system recorded 99.95% uptime last month. Does this meet the SLA?
The DevOps team wants to upgrade the caching layer to Redis 8.0. Is this consistent with the project requirements?
The API is responding at 210ms at the 99th percentile. Does this meet the performance requirement?
